moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off!
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival begins today, running until Sunday with headliners like Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Sun's out (mostly!), tents are up, and the Isle of Wight Festival is officially ON! Who are you most excited to see this weekend? #IOW2026

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: The Cure, Calvin Harris, Lewis Capaldi – massive names descending on the Isle of Wight this weekend! Get ready for some unforgettable sets.

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Takes Over Glasgow
moments.blurb: Scotland's biggest music festival, TRNSMT, kicks off tomorrow, Friday June 19th, at Glasgow Green with headliners including Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Ready
angles.copy: Glasgow Green is about to erupt! TRNSMT Festival starts tomorrow with Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi leading the charge. Who's heading to Scotland's biggest party?

angles.name: Artist Spotlight
angles.copy: From Britpop legend Richard Ashcroft to indie giants Kasabian, TRNSMT's lineup is stacked. What's your must-see act?

moments.title: England's Next World Cup Challenge
moments.blurb: England faces Ghana in their next FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage match on Tuesday, June 23rd at 4pm BST.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Come on England! The Three Lions are back in World Cup action on Tuesday, June 23rd, taking on Ghana. Kick-off is 4pm BST. Will you be watching?

angles.name: Team Talk
angles.copy: Big game coming up for England against Ghana on Tuesday. Who needs to step up and deliver a match-winning performance?

moments.title: Scotland's World Cup Clash with Morocco
moments.blurb: Scotland continues its FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign against Morocco tomorrow, Friday June 19th, with an 11pm BST kick-off.

angles.name: Scottish Support
angles.copy: It's World Cup time for Scotland again tomorrow! They face Morocco at 11pm BST. Get behind the team!

angles.name: Late Night Football
angles.copy: Late one for the Tartan Army tomorrow night as Scotland take on Morocco in the World Cup at 11pm. Who's staying up to cheer them on?

moments.title: Happy 84th Birthday, Paul McCartney!
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles and Wings co-founder Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Fab Four Icon
angles.copy: From The Beatles to Wings and an incredible solo career, a very happy 84th birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney!

angles.name: Musical Legacy
angles.copy: An absolute titan of music, Paul McCartney turns 84 today. What's your favourite Macca song, whether solo or with The Beatles?

moments.title: Happy 38th Birthday, Josh Dun!
moments.blurb: Twenty One Pilots drummer Josh Dun celebrates his 38th birthday today.

angles.name: Drummer Boy
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to Josh Dun of Twenty One Pilots, who turns 38 today! Keep those beats coming!

angles.name: TOP Percussion
angles.copy: Happy 38th Birthday to the incredibly talented Josh Dun, the powerhouse drummer behind Twenty One Pilots. What's your favourite TOP track?

moments.title: Happy 65th Birthday, Alison Moyet!
moments.blurb: The iconic voice of Yazoo and successful solo artist Alison Moyet celebrates her 65th birthday today.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! From Yazoo to her amazing solo career, what's your top track from her?

angles.name: Soulful Vocals
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 65th birthday to the distinctive and powerful vocalist, Alison Moyet. Her voice is simply timeless.

moments.title: Longest Day of the Year Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the UK, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Summer Officially Begins
angles.copy: Get ready for maximum daylight! The Summer Solstice is this Sunday, June 21st, officially kicking off astronomical summer. What are your plans for the longest day?

angles.name: Daylight Savings
angles.copy: More daylight for longer! This Sunday marks the Summer Solstice, with the sun at its highest point. Time to make the most of those extra hours.

moments.title: UK Braces for Potential Heatwave
moments.blurb: Forecasters are predicting a potential heatwave for parts of the UK, particularly the south, with temperatures expected to rise significantly towards the end of next week.

angles.name: Summer Sun Coming
angles.copy: Looks like summer is finally arriving! A potential heatwave is on the cards for parts of the UK next week. Get those sunnies ready!

angles.name: Stay Hydrated
angles.copy: Temperatures are set to soar next week with a potential heatwave. Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool!

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 Premieres
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of HBO's 'House of the Dragon' premieres on Sky Atlantic and NOW on Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: Dragon Fire Returns
angles.copy: Get ready for more Targaryen drama! House of the Dragon Season 3 lands on Sky Atlantic and NOW this Monday, June 22nd. Who's excited?

angles.name: Who's on the Iron Throne?
angles.copy: The battle for the Iron Throne continues! House of the Dragon returns for its third season on Monday. What are your predictions?

moments.title: Rik Mayall Tribute Documentary
moments.blurb: A new documentary, 'Rik Mayall: Magnificent B'stard', celebrating the life and career of the beloved comedian, airs on Sky Documentaries on Thursday, June 25th.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: A true legend of British comedy, Rik Mayall is celebrated in a new documentary, 'Magnificent B'stard', airing Thursday on Sky Documentaries. Don't miss it!

angles.name: Young Ones Icon
angles.copy: From The Young Ones to Bottom, Rik Mayall brought so much joy and anarchy to our screens. A new doc on his life airs Thursday. What's your favourite Rik Mayall moment?

moments.title: Queens That Changed the World Returns
moments.blurb: Season 2 of the docuseries 'Queens That Changed the World' premieres on BBC Select on Thursday, June 25th, exploring more formidable female rulers.

angles.name: Powerful Women
angles.copy: Discover more incredible stories of powerful female rulers as 'Queens That Changed the World' returns for Season 2 this Thursday on BBC Select.

angles.name: History Buffs
angles.copy: If you love history and strong female figures, Season 2 of 'Queens That Changed the World' is for you! Premieres Thursday.

moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival continues this week with a line-up including Elvis Costello & The Imposters with Charlie Sexton tonight, Sophie Ellis-Bextor on Friday, and an 80s Classical night on Saturday.

angles.name: Palace Party
angles.copy: Music and majesty! The Hampton Court Palace Festival continues this week with Elvis Costello tonight, Sophie Ellis-Bextor Friday and an 80s Classical finale Saturday.

angles.name: Iconic Acts
angles.copy: Still time to catch some incredible artists at Hampton Court Palace Festival! Elvis Costello and an 80s Classical night are among the highlights this weekend.

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Lineup Revealed
moments.blurb: The debut Blenheim Palace Festival, running from June 27th to July 4th, has announced a stellar lineup including Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, and Michael Bublé.

angles.name: Big Names at the Palace
angles.copy: What a lineup! Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, and Michael Bublé are heading to the new Blenheim Palace Festival starting June 27th. Tickets on sale now!

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Exciting news for festival-goers! Blenheim Palace is hosting its first festival with some HUGE names. Who would you most want to see?

moments.title: New True Crime 'The Witness' on Netflix
moments.blurb: The new British drama series 'The Witness', focusing on the murder of Rachel Nickell, premieres today on Netflix UK.

angles.name: Netflix True Crime
angles.copy: If you're a true crime fan, 'The Witness' about the Rachel Nickell murder drops today on Netflix UK. Are you watching?

angles.name: New Drama
angles.copy: Looking for a gripping new drama? 'The Witness', a British series exploring the Rachel Nickell case, is available now on Netflix.

moments.title: Happy 41st Birthday, Lana Del Rey!
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey celebrates her 41st birthday on Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Queen of Melancholy
angles.copy: Sending birthday love to the unique and captivating Lana Del Rey, who turns 41 this Sunday! What's your favourite LDR track?

angles.name: Iconic Sound
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible Lana Del Rey on Sunday! Her distinctive sound has truly shaped modern music.

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Lionel Richie!
moments.blurb: Music legend Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday on Saturday, June 20th.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Hello, It's Lionel!
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? It's Lionel Richie's 77th birthday this Saturday! What's your go-to Lionel track?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie this Saturday! His songs are truly timeless.

moments.title: Upcoming Album Releases: Muse, The Strokes
moments.blurb: New albums are set to drop on June 26th, including 'The Wow!' by Muse and 'Reality Awaits' by The Strokes.

angles.name: New Music Friday Prep
angles.copy: Get ready for some fresh rock! New albums from Muse ('The Wow!') and The Strokes ('Reality Awaits') are out next Friday, June 26th.

angles.name: Album Drops
angles.copy: Big releases coming next week! Muse and The Strokes both drop new albums on June 26th. What are you hoping for?
